final_prompt.prompt:
Create a WeChat official account article cover for a fragrance new product launch.

Style/medium: needs a premium, high-end aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be centered composition with title prominently featured
Subject: must include fragrance product launch context
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs an autumn atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs autumn tones — exact hex values are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "染秋" (large, primary), "秋意染染 时光留香" (secondary)
Constraints: must be 900x500 aspect ratio, title must be the focal point
Avoid:
